elements.text:
SU-8 photoresist and photolithography 

Advantages:

Adjustable dimensions and geometry
Thin overall microfluidic thickness when sealed by a thin film
Biocompatibility of SU-8

Disadvantages:

Multiple cleanroom fabrication steps carried out by trained personnel
Labour intensive fabrication
Adhesion of the SU-8 is good on Si substrates but critical on PCB surface
